title: Fundraising
shortSummary: Raise the money a campaign needs — from grassroots small-dollar donations to major donor cultivation, compliance with Australian electoral law, and digital fundraising strategy.
whyItMatters: Money is the oxygen of political campaigns. Without fundraising capability, even the best candidate with the best message cannot compete. Understanding how to raise funds ethically and legally is a non-negotiable political skill in Australia.
coreConcepts: Australian political donation laws and disclosure
